paper_title: Tip Growth Models in Pollen Tubes

methods.description: This method involves using time-lapse fluorescence microscopy to analyze the internalization of fluorescent dyes in pollen tubes, providing evidence for the alternative model of tip growth.

steps.description: Time-lapse fluorescence microscopic analysis of the internalization of red fluorescent FM4-64 into N. tabacum pollen tubes preloaded with FM1-43.
steps.searchable_summary: perform time-lapse fluorescence microscopy on pollen tubes with FM4-64 and FM1-43 dyes

steps.description: Analyze co-localization of FM4-64 with preloaded FM1-43 at the interface between the apical PM and the inverted cone-shape zone of vesicle accumulation.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze co-localization of FM4-64 and FM1-43 in microscopy images

methods.method_name: Transmission Electron Microscopy with Nanogold Particles
methods.description: This method uses transmission electron microscopy to observe the uptake of charged nanogold particles in pollen tubes, providing evidence for endocytic membrane internalization at the pollen tube apex.

steps.description: Employ transmission electron microscopy to observe the uptake of positively or negatively charged nanogold particles into N. tabacum pollen tubes.
steps.searchable_summary: use transmission electron microscopy to observe nanogold particle uptake in pollen tubes

steps.description: Analyze the localization of charged particles in vesicles and vacuoles at different time points after application.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze localization of nanogold particles in microscopy images over time
